content:
# {{projectName}}

A modern Ionic mobile application built with Angular and Capacitor.

## Overview

This project is a cross-platform mobile application built using:
- Ionic Framework
- Angular
- Capacitor
- TypeScript

## Features

- Cross-platform development (iOS, Android, Web)
- Modern UI components with Ionic
- TypeScript for type safety
- Angular for robust application architecture
- Capacitor for native functionality
- Responsive design
- Built-in theming support
- Component-based architecture
- Service-based state management
- Route guards for authentication
- HTTP interceptors
- Error handling
- Internationalization support

## Prerequisites

- Node.js (v14 or later)
- npm (v6 or later)
- Ionic CLI
- Android Studio (for Android development)
- Xcode (for iOS development, macOS only)

## Installation

1. Install the Ionic CLI globally:
```bash
npm install -g @ionic/cli
```

2. Install project dependencies:
```bash
npm install
```

## Development

To start the development server:

```bash
ionic serve
```

This will start the development server and open the application in your default browser.

## Building for Production

To create a production build:

```bash
ionic build
```

## Adding Native Platforms

### Android

```bash
ionic capacitor add android
ionic capacitor copy
ionic capacitor open android
```

### iOS

```bash
ionic capacitor add ios
ionic capacitor copy
ionic capacitor open ios
```

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── app/                    # Application source code
│   ├── components/        # Reusable UI components
│   ├── pages/            # Page components
│   ├── services/         # Business logic and data operations
│   ├── guards/           # Route guards
│   ├── interfaces/       # TypeScript interfaces
│   ├── models/           # Data models
│   ├── utils/            # Utility functions
│   ├── constants/        # Application constants
│   ├── pipes/            # Angular pipes
│   ├── directives/       # Custom directives
│   ├── resolvers/        # Route resolvers
│   ├── store/            # State management
│   ├── animations/       # Animation definitions
│   ├── validators/       # Form validators
│   ├── interceptors/     # HTTP interceptors
│   ├── error-handlers/   # Error handling
│   └── translations/     # i18n files
├── assets/               # Static assets
├── theme/                # Theme customization
└── environments/         # Environment configurations
```

## Available Scripts

- `ionic serve`: Start the development server
- `ionic build`: Create a production build
- `ionic capacitor add android`: Add Android platform
- `ionic capacitor add ios`: Add iOS platform
- `ionic capacitor copy`: Copy web assets to native platforms
- `ionic capacitor open android`: Open Android project
- `ionic capacitor open ios`: Open iOS project

## Contributing

1. Fork the repository
2. Create your feature branch (`git checkout -b feature/amazing-feature`)
3. Commit your changes (`git commit -m 'Add some amazing feature'`)
4. Push to the branch (`git push origin feature/amazing-feature`)
5. Open a Pull Request

## License

This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.

## Acknowledgments

- [Ionic Framework](https://ionicframework.com/)
- [Angular](https://angular.io/)
- [Capacitor](https://capacitorjs.com/)
